checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v6 validation macro-F1 across inherited epoch zero and the pre-frozen three-epoch conditioned-head continuation schedule
calibration: equal-source weighting across the nine declared validation sources, minimum temperature 1.0
expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
test_disclosure: The continuation schedule, source set, checkpoint, and every numerical parameter were selected and frozen from manifest-v6 validation. No v13 frozen-test image, label, logit, metric, threshold, calibration value, or per-example failure was inspected before this contract was frozen.
